title: Manufacturing Engineer - Pidilite Industries - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Pidilite Industries - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Pidilite Industries are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pidilite Industries:
Pidilite Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries!
